ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic term (e.g., 2021/1, 2020/2) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic term */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the term is currently active */,
  "type" TEXT /* Specifies the type of term (e.g., Semester, Quarter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the academic program */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor, Master, Doctorate) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Detailed admission requirements for the program */,
  "program_website" TEXT /* URL of the program's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., PENF-0061) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours for the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the course belongs to */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is required for the program */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is an elective */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic term the course is being offered in */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section number of the course offering */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is offered (e.g., classroom, online) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the offering */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the offering */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether enrollment is still open for the offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES academic_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the student was admitted to the program */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., Enrolled, Graduated, On Leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being enrolled */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering being enrolled in */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student for the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Withdrawn, Completed) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with the prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co_requisites" (
  "co_requisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-requisite course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with the co-requisite */,
  "co_requisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-requisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_requisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_requisites_co_requisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_requisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_requisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equivalencies" (
  "equivalency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equivalent course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with the equivalency */,
  "equivalent_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equivalent course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equivalency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equivalencies_equivalent_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("equivalent_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equivalencies_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "syllabi" (
  "syllabus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each syllabus */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the syllabus belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the syllabus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the syllabus was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the syllabus was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("syllabus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_syllabi_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the assignment was last updated */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the assignment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the assignment instructions or materials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the grade belongs to */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student for the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the grade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the grade was last updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Instructor's comments on the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)
